n: Book II, Chapter 1: Wrought in Secret

steps.t: The Lady Arwen is at Imdolen, on the slope that overlooks the road into the Misty Mountains, north of Rivendell. Elrond has asked you to speak with hi…
Halbarad is by the stables in Rivendell. Arwen has given you the standard she made for Aragorn and has asked you to bring it to Halbarad in Rivendell …
